---
title: "Tooltip Explorer – Performance Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cosmo
    highlight: tango
    self_contained: true
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
params:
  tickers:
    label: "Tickers"
    value: ["AAPL", "MSFT"]
  from:
    label: "Start date"
    value: "2023-01-01"
  to:
    label: "End date"
    value: !r as.character(Sys.Date())
  vol_window:
    label: "Rolling vol window (days)"
    value: 30
  perf_data:
    label: "Performance summary"
    value: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 9,
  fig.height = 5
)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(knitr)
library(tooltipexplorer)
```

## Overview

This report summarises equity performance for
**`r paste(params$tickers, collapse = ", ")`**
over the period **`r params$from`** to **`r params$to`**,
using a **`r params$vol_window`-day** rolling volatility window.

Data sourced via `tidyquant::tq_get()` from Yahoo Finance and Tidy Finance
factors from the `tidyfinance` package.

---

## Performance Summary

```{r perf-table}
perf <- params$perf_data

if (!is.null(perf) && nrow(perf) > 0) {
  perf |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      ann_return = scales::percent(ann_return, accuracy = 0.1),
      ann_vol    = scales::percent(ann_vol,    accuracy = 0.1),
      sharpe     = round(sharpe, 2)
    ) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      Ticker           = symbol,
      `Ann. Return`    = ann_return,
      `Ann. Volatility` = ann_vol,
      `Sharpe Ratio`   = sharpe
    ) |>
    knitr::kable(align = "lrrr", caption = "Annualised performance metrics")
} else {
  cat("No performance data available.")
}
```

> **Notes:**  
> - Annualised return = mean daily log return × 252  
> - Annualised volatility = SD of daily log returns × √252  
> - Sharpe ratio assumes a zero risk-free rate

---

## Price History

```{r price-chart}
prices <- tooltipexplorer::get_stock_prices(
  tickers = params$tickers,
  from    = params$from,
  to      = params$to
)

ggplot2::ggplot(prices, ggplot2::aes(x = date, y = adjusted, colour = symbol)) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title  = "Adjusted Closing Prices",
    x      = NULL,
    y      = "Price (USD)",
    colour = "Ticker"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

---

## Daily Log Returns

```{r returns-chart}
returns <- tooltipexplorer::get_stock_returns(prices)

ggplot2::ggplot(returns, ggplot2::aes(x = date, y = daily_return, colour = symbol)) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.7) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title  = "Daily Log Returns",
    x      = NULL,
    y      = "Log Return",
    colour = "Ticker"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

---

## Rolling Annualised Volatility

```{r vol-chart}
vol <- tooltipexplorer::compute_rolling_vol(returns, window = params$vol_window) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(rolling_vol))

ggplot2::ggplot(vol, ggplot2::aes(x = date, y = rolling_vol, colour = symbol)) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title  = paste0("Rolling ", params$vol_window, "-Day Annualised Volatility"),
    x      = NULL,
    y      = "Annualised Vol",
    colour = "Ticker"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

---

*Generated by [tooltipexplorer](https://github.com/) on `r Sys.time()`.*
